prompt: If all roses are flowers and some flowers fade quickly, can we conclude that some roses fade quickly?
completion:
Yes that's right!

Roses are beautiful. They have a wonderful way of blooming even more beautifully than any flower. Roses bloom every day, but they do not exist.
 मैं इस बारे में क्या है कि कुछ लोगों को वे सुंदर फूल (Beautiful flowers) और जो फूलों की सुंदरता
